maria buys granola bars that come in boxes of 12 bars per box, with each bar containing 90 calories. if maria has already eaten 3 bars, the remaining bars in the box are 12 - 3 = 9 bars. the remaining calories in the box are 9 * 90 = 810 calories.  

the remaining calories in the box are 810 calories. is there anything else i can help with?
